case_title: JOSEPH DICK VS. MARC D GLOMB

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-29-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-29-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT GLOMB, MARC D
ORDER TO JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT IS "GRANTED", PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,533.17 FILED BY DICK, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT GLOMB, MARC D ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-29-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DICK, JOSEPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GLOMB, MARC D $867.49 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $977.49, PLAINTIFF MAY CASH THE CHECK FOR $466.23 PREVIOUSLY TENDERED BY DEFENDANT, AND DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT FOR THAT PRIOR PAYMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT GLOMB, MARC D
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-15-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT GLOMB, MARC D
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-29-2010 - JUDGMENT.
